testcase.classname: ProtectedRoute redirects to login when user is not authenticated
testcase.name: ProtectedRoute redirects to login when user is not authenticated

testcase.classname: ProtectedRoute renders protected content when user exists
testcase.name: ProtectedRoute renders protected content when user exists

testcase.classname: TaskItem renders task details
testcase.name: TaskItem renders task details

testcase.classname: TaskItem calls onToggle with inverse done state
testcase.name: TaskItem calls onToggle with inverse done state

testcase.classname: TaskItem calls onDelete with task id
testcase.name: TaskItem calls onDelete with task id

testcase.classname: FilterBar renders subject, priority, and search controls
testcase.name: FilterBar renders subject, priority, and search controls

testcase.classname: FilterBar updates subject and query through onChange
testcase.name: FilterBar updates subject and query through onChange

testcase.classname: FilterBar clear button resets filters for free plan
testcase.name: FilterBar clear button resets filters for free plan

testcase.classname: FilterBar shows due date range only for pro and clear resets due filters
testcase.name: FilterBar shows due date range only for pro and clear resets due filters

testcase.classname: TasksContext loads user tasks from localStorage on mount
testcase.name: TasksContext loads user tasks from localStorage on mount

testcase.classname: TasksContext handles invalid localStorage JSON safely
testcase.name: TasksContext handles invalid localStorage JSON safely

testcase.classname: TasksContext adds task, updates derived subjects, and persists to localStorage
testcase.name: TasksContext adds task, updates derived subjects, and persists to localStorage

testcase.classname: TasksContext toggles done state and removes task
testcase.name: TasksContext toggles done state and removes task

testcase.classname: TasksContext does not mutate tasks when no authenticated user
testcase.name: TasksContext does not mutate tasks when no authenticated user

testcase.classname: TaskForm renders task form controls
testcase.name: TaskForm renders task form controls

testcase.classname: TaskForm keeps submit button disabled until title and subject are provided
testcase.name: TaskForm keeps submit button disabled until title and subject are provided

testcase.classname: TaskForm submits expected payload for free plan and resets form
testcase.name: TaskForm submits expected payload for free plan and resets form

testcase.classname: TaskForm shows due date only for pro plan and includes it in payload
testcase.name: TaskForm shows due date only for pro plan and includes it in payload

testcase.classname: TaskForm does not submit for empty or whitespace-only required fields
testcase.name: TaskForm does not submit for empty or whitespace-only required fields

testcase.classname: ForgotPassword page renders email input and action buttons
testcase.name: ForgotPassword page renders email input and action buttons

testcase.classname: ForgotPassword page submits reset request and shows success message
testcase.name: ForgotPassword page submits reset request and shows success message

testcase.classname: ForgotPassword page shows loading text while request is in progress
testcase.name: ForgotPassword page shows loading text while request is in progress

testcase.classname: ForgotPassword page shows error on failure and supports back navigation
testcase.name: ForgotPassword page shows error on failure and supports back navigation

testcase.classname: Groups page shows login prompt when user is not available
testcase.name: Groups page shows login prompt when user is not available

testcase.classname: Groups page renders empty groups state from firestore snapshot
testcase.name: Groups page renders empty groups state from firestore snapshot

testcase.classname: Groups page creates group with invite email and navigates to room
testcase.name: Groups page creates group with invite email and navigates to room

testcase.classname: Groups page handles duplicate self-invite and create errors
testcase.name: Groups page handles duplicate self-invite and create errors

testcase.classname: Login page renders login form and basic accessible controls
testcase.name: Login page renders login form and basic accessible controls

testcase.classname: Login page submits credentials and navigates to tasks on success
testcase.name: Login page submits credentials and navigates to tasks on success

testcase.classname: Login page shows an error alert when email/password login fails
testcase.name: Login page shows an error alert when email/password login fails

testcase.classname: Login page navigates to forgot-password screen on click
testcase.name: Login page navigates to forgot-password screen on click

testcase.classname: Login page supports google login success and failure paths
testcase.name: Login page supports google login success and failure paths

testcase.classname: App renders app without crashing
